calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-06-2025 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion For Dismissal Of Action Without Prejudice Pursuant To Crc 3.770
Off Calendar Jan-30-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: PLAINTIFF MICHAELA HENDERSON, AN INDIVIDUAL ON BEHALF OF HERSELF AND ON BEHALF OF ALL PERSONS SIMILARLY SITUATED's Motion For Dismissal Of Action Without Prejudice Pursuant To Crc 3.770.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

The motion to dismiss without prejudice is granted. The court finds that dismissal will not prejudice class members and no notice to them is required.

Order signed.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (301/CVA)
